---
format:
  pdf:
    fig-align: center
    geometry:
      - top=1mm
      - bottom=1mm
      - left=1mm
      - right=1mm
    papersize: a4
execute: 
  echo: false
  error: false
  warning: false
  message: false
params:
  faltid: NA
  dat: NA
  lankod: "Östergötlands"
  directory: NA
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(sf)
library(leaflet)
library(leaflet.providers)
library(mapview)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(glue)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
```

```{r}
#| label: "load data"
#| include: false

# FIX: replaced lazyLoad() — only works in fully compiled installs.
# loadNamespace() triggers internal lazy-loading making sysdata available.
loadNamespace("surveymapR")
counties <- get("counties", envir = asNamespace("surveymapR"))
lokaler  <- get("lokaler",  envir = asNamespace("surveymapR"))

if (is.na(params$dat)) {
  dat <- lokaler
} else {
  dat <- read_csv2(params$dat)
}

tmp <- dat %>%
  filter(sit_aggregated == params$faltid) %>% 
  mutate(geo_geom = structure(geo_geom, class = "WKB"),
         geometry = st_as_sfc(geo_geom, EWKB = T, crs = 3006)) %>% 
  select(SiteID = sit_uid, SiteText = sit_name, segment = geo_seg_sequence, geometry) %>% 
  st_sf() %>% 
  st_cast() %>% 
  st_transform(crs = 4326)

LAN <- counties %>% 
  filter(str_detect(LNNAMN, params$lankod)) %>% 
  st_transform(crs = 4326)

sitelabel <- tmp %>% 
  mutate(SiteText = str_remove(SiteText, " slinga.*| transekter.*")) %>% 
  distinct(SiteText) %>% 
  pull()
```

```{r}
#| label: "Make data elements"

# Overall bounding box (used for overview map)
bbo <- tmp %>% st_bbox()

# Centroid of overall bbox
cent <- st_as_sfc(bbo, crs = st_crs(4326)) %>% 
  st_centroid() %>% 
  st_coordinates()

# Transects and slingor
trans <- tmp %>% filter(str_detect(SiteText, "transekt"))
sling <- tmp %>% filter(str_detect(SiteText, "sling"))

# Endpoints of slinga
if (ncol(sling %>% st_coordinates()) > 3) {
  slingend <- sling %>% st_coordinates() %>% as_tibble() %>%
    group_by(L2) %>% summarise(X = first(X), Y = first(Y))
} else {
  slingend <- sling %>% st_coordinates() %>% as_tibble() %>%
    group_by(L1) %>% summarise(X = first(X), Y = first(Y))
}

# Endpoints of transekt
if (ncol(trans %>% st_coordinates()) > 3) {
  transend <- trans %>% st_coordinates() %>% as_tibble() %>%
    group_by(L2) %>% summarise(X = first(X), Y = first(Y))
} else {
  transend <- trans %>% st_coordinates() %>% as_tibble() %>%
    group_by(L1) %>% summarise(X = first(X), Y = first(Y))
}
```



```{r}
#| label: "Slingelement"
#| include: true
#| fig-pos: "!"
#| out-width: "100%"

# Passing sling as data argument makes leaflet auto-fit to its extent
bbo_sling <- st_bbox(sling)
pad <- 0.0005  # ~50m padding in degrees
m <- leaflet(options = leafletOptions(zoomControl = FALSE,
                                      attributionControl = FALSE)) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldImagery") %>%
  fitBounds(lng1 = as.numeric(bbo_sling["xmin"]) - pad,
            lat1 = as.numeric(bbo_sling["ymin"]) - pad,
            lng2 = as.numeric(bbo_sling["xmax"]) + pad,
            lat2 = as.numeric(bbo_sling["ymax"]) + pad) %>%

  addPolylines(data = sling, color = "#ffff31",
               label = sling$segment,
               labelOptions = labelOptions(textsize = "16px",
                                           noHide = TRUE,
                                           style = list("font-weight" = "bold",
                                                        background = rgb(255,255,255,0,maxColorValue = 255),
                                                        color = "white")),
               opacity = 0.6, weight = 5) %>%
  addCircleMarkers(data = slingend, lng = ~X, lat = ~Y,
                   radius = 7, color = "orange",
                   stroke = FALSE, fillOpacity = 1) %>% 
  addScaleBar(position = "topright", options = scaleBarOptions(imperial = F))

mapshot2(m,
         url  = glue("{params$directory}/m.html"),
         file = glue("{params$directory}/Slingor.png"),
         remove_controls = c("zoomControl","layersControl","homeButton",
                             "drawToolbar","easyButton"),
         vwidth = 800, vheight = 900)

# Add white header strip with black label above the map
library(magick)
img  <- image_read(glue("{params$directory}/Slingor.png"))
iw   <- image_info(img)$width
header <- image_blank(iw, 60L, color = "white") %>%
  image_annotate(paste("Slingor", sitelabel),
                 size = 36, weight = 700, color = "black",
                 gravity = "West", location = "+16+0")
img <- image_append(c(header, img), stack = TRUE)
image_write(img, glue("{params$directory}/Slingor.png"))

knitr::include_graphics(glue("{params$directory}/Slingor.png"))
```



```{r}
#| label: "Transektelement"
#| include: true
#| fig-pos: "!"
#| out-width: "100%"

bbo_trans <- st_bbox(trans)
m <- leaflet(options = leafletOptions(zoomControl = FALSE,
                                      attributionControl = FALSE)) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldImagery") %>%
  fitBounds(lng1 = as.numeric(bbo_trans["xmin"]) - pad,
            lat1 = as.numeric(bbo_trans["ymin"]) - pad,
            lng2 = as.numeric(bbo_trans["xmax"]) + pad,
            lat2 = as.numeric(bbo_trans["ymax"]) + pad) %>%
  addPolylines(data = trans, color = "#b7c9e2",
               label = trans$segment,
               noClip = TRUE,
               labelOptions = labelOptions(textsize = "16px",
                                           noHide = TRUE,
                                           style = list("font-weight" = "bold",
                                                        background = rgb(255,255,255,0.1,maxColorValue = 255),
                                                        color = "white")),
               opacity = 0.8, weight = 6) %>% 
  addScaleBar(position = "topright", options = scaleBarOptions(imperial = F))

mapshot2(m,
         url  = glue("{params$directory}/m.html"),
         file = glue("{params$directory}/Transekter.png"),
         remove_controls = c("zoomControl","layersControl","homeButton",
                             "drawToolbar","easyButton"),
         vwidth = 800, vheight = 900)

# Add white header strip with black label above the map
img  <- image_read(glue("{params$directory}/Transekter.png"))
iw   <- image_info(img)$width
header <- image_blank(iw, 60L, color = "white") %>%
  image_annotate(paste("Transekter", sitelabel),
                 size = 36, weight = 700, color = "black",
                 gravity = "West", location = "+16+0")
img <- image_append(c(header, img), stack = TRUE)
image_write(img, glue("{params$directory}/Transekter.png"))

knitr::include_graphics(glue("{params$directory}/Transekter.png"))
```

```{r}
#| label: "Översikt och transekter"
#| out-width: "100%"
#| include: true

# Render Overview map
m <- leaflet(options = leafletOptions(zoomControl = FALSE, attributionControl = TRUE)) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  setView(lng = cent[1], lat = cent[2], zoom = 12) %>%
  addMarkers(lng = cent[1], lat = cent[2]) %>% 
  addPolylines(data = sling, color = "orange", weight = 2.5) %>%
  addPolylines(data = trans, color = "orange", weight = 2.5) %>% 
  addLabelOnlyMarkers(lng = bbo["xmax"] + 0.05, lat = bbo["ymax"] + 0.02,
                      label = sitelabel,
                      labelOptions = labelOptions(textsize = "40px", noHide = TRUE,
                        style = list("font-weight" = "bold",
                                     "background-color" = "white",
                                     "border-color" = "transparent",
                                     "box-shadow" = "none"))) %>%
  addScaleBar(position = "topright", options = scaleBarOptions(imperial = F))
mapshot2(m, url = glue("{params$directory}/m.html"),
         file = glue("{params$directory}/Overview.png"),
         remove_controls = c("zoomControl","layersControl","homeButton","drawToolbar","easyButton"),
         vwidth = 750, vheight = 750)

# Render County map
m <- leaflet(LAN, options = leafletOptions(zoomControl = FALSE, attributionControl = TRUE)) %>%
  addTiles() %>% 
  addPolylines(color = "red", weight = 4) %>% 
  addMarkers(lng = cent[1], lat = cent[2],
             label = sitelabel,
             labelOptions = labelOptions(textsize = "22px", noHide = TRUE,
                                         offset = c(15, -45),
                                         style = list("font-weight" = "bold"))) %>% 
  addScaleBar(position = "topright", options = scaleBarOptions(imperial = F))
mapshot2(m, url = glue("{params$directory}/m.html"),
         file = glue("{params$directory}/Lan.png"),
         remove_controls = c("zoomControl","layersControl","homeButton","drawToolbar","easyButton"),
         vwidth = 750, vheight = 750)

# Render combined slingor + transekter map
m <- leaflet(options = leafletOptions(zoomControl = FALSE, attributionControl = FALSE)) %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  addProviderTiles("Esri.WorldImagery") %>%
  fitBounds(lng1 = as.numeric(bbo["xmin"]),
            lat1 = as.numeric(bbo["ymin"]),
            lng2 = as.numeric(bbo["xmax"]),
            lat2 = as.numeric(bbo["ymax"])) %>%
  addPolylines(data = sling, color = "#ffff31", label = sling$segment,
               labelOptions = labelOptions(textsize = "12px", noHide = TRUE,
                 style = list("font-weight" = "bold",
                              background = rgb(255,255,255,0.1,maxColorValue = 255),
                              color = "white")),
               opacity = 0.8, weight = 5) %>%
  addPolylines(data = trans, color = "#b7c9e2", label = trans$segment,
               labelOptions = labelOptions(textsize = "12px", noHide = TRUE,
                 style = list("font-weight" = "bold",
                              background = rgb(255,255,255,0.1,maxColorValue = 255),
                              color = "white")),
               opacity = 0.8, weight = 6) %>% 
  addCircleMarkers(data = slingend, lng = ~X, lat = ~Y,
                   radius = 7, color = "orange", stroke = FALSE, fillOpacity = 1) %>% 
  addScaleBar(position = "topright", options = scaleBarOptions(imperial = F))
mapshot2(m, url = glue("{params$directory}/m.html"),
         file = glue("{params$directory}/TransSlingor.png"),
         remove_controls = c("zoomControl","layersControl","homeButton","drawToolbar","easyButton"),
         vwidth = 900, vheight = 700)

# Composite: side-by-side top row + full-width bottom row using magick
library(magick)
ov  <- image_read(glue("{params$directory}/Overview.png"))
lan <- image_read(glue("{params$directory}/Lan.png"))
bot <- image_read(glue("{params$directory}/TransSlingor.png"))

# Make top row: resize both to same height then join side by side
h <- 750L
ov  <- image_resize(ov,  glue("x{h}"))
lan <- image_resize(lan, glue("x{h}"))
h_gap <- image_blank(30L, h, color = "white")
top_row <- image_append(c(ov, h_gap, lan), stack = FALSE)

# Make bottom row: resize to match top row width
top_w <- image_info(top_row)$width
bot <- image_resize(bot, glue("{top_w}x"))

# Add whitespace between top and bottom rows
gap <- image_blank(top_w, 20L, color = "white")
combined <- image_append(c(top_row, gap, bot), stack = TRUE)
image_write(combined, glue("{params$directory}/OverviewPage.png"))

knitr::include_graphics(glue("{params$directory}/OverviewPage.png"))
```
